name: Carreg Cennen Castle Circular
terrain: Field paths, farmland, short rocky sections
highlights: Most dramatically sited castle in Wales, atop a 100m limestone cliff.
points_of_interest: Carreg Cennen Castle; the underground cave passage
picnic_spots: Castle courtyard; riverside by the mill
food_drink_nearby: Castle farmhouse tearoom (famous for cream teas)
hazards_notes: Torch needed for castle cave; slippery rocks
